offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, budget mismanagement causes cash flow gaps. We provide budget tracking instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in tracking procurement budget usage effectively.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on budget management
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Engage in community forums for Etsy tools
try_it: Let users try budget usage alerts and dashboard on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Make a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing budget data
